releases.introKey: Health Q&A, AI workout builder, sleep predictions, injury alerts, a 3D muscle map, and more — your training just got smarter.

features.summaryKey: Ask questions about your health data and get instant answers powered by on-device intelligence.
Describe your ideal workout in natural language and get a ready-to-use template instantly.
See tonight's predicted sleep quality based on your recent patterns and today's activity.
Get a daily injury risk score based on your training load, recovery, and workout history.
Receive personalized exercise suggestions based on muscle fatigue and training balance.
Review a summary of your week — volume, intensity, and key highlights.
Explore your muscle recovery on an upgraded 3D body model with smoother detail.
Set a nightly reminder to wind down and protect your sleep schedule.

releases.introKey: Widgets, weather, coaching, sleep debt, cardio tracking, themes, and three languages — all in one update.

features.summaryKey: Add DUNE widgets to your Home Screen and glance at your key scores without opening the app.
Check live weather, outdoor fitness guidance, and hourly conditions before you head out.
Spot your weekly sleep debt and compare recent rest against your baseline.
Review unread insights and jump back into important updates any time.
Open recovery details, weekly stats, and suggestions built around your recent training.
Track daily habits and keep auto achievements moving with your routine.
Switch between eight visual themes from Settings and make the app feel more like yours.
Start workouts faster on Apple Watch and sync completed sessions back to iPhone.
Track distance, pace, and heart rate in real time during runs and walks.
Get personalized coaching cards with actionable tips based on your condition and trends.
Full support for English, Korean, and Japanese across every screen.
Check PM2.5 and PM10 levels alongside weather before your outdoor session.

releases.introKey: Track workouts, check your condition, and see your progress — all built around your body's data.

features.summaryKey: Log sets, reps, and weight with custom exercises, draft recovery, and search filters.
Check your HRV and resting heart rate to see how ready your body is each day.
Create, edit, and start workouts from saved templates for a faster session.
Track 1RM estimates and view exercise history charts to measure your progress.
See which muscle groups are recovered, overloaded, or ready on an interactive body map.
Track workouts on Apple Watch and sync completed sessions back to iPhone.
View sleep, body, and active indicators together in one score-driven dashboard.
Full iPad layout with sidebar navigation and universal design.
